summary: Closed the round-7 integrity gaps by preserving self-check severity end-to-end, adding PM-003 issue counts to the board run-postmortem path, and validating learning/repair outputs against their declared schemas before they mutate governed artifacts.
highlights: Board and result pipelines now preserve self-check severity instead of promoting warnings into material or error-level evidence.
Run-postmortem PM-003 is now present on board-driven exits as well as zero-round closeout.
Learning and repair outputs now fail closed on schema validation before touching rulebook or round evidence.
